entries.source: A good learning session has a loop
entries.value: Iseshini yokufunda enhle inomjikelezo

entries.source: A practical look at how AI can make learning clearer, more personal, and more accessible without turning students into passive answer collectors.
entries.value: Ukubuka okusebenzayo kokuthi i-AI ingenza kanjani ukufunda kucace, kube komuntu siqu, futhi kufinyeleleke kakhudlwana ngaphandle kokwenza abafundi babe abaqoqi bezimpendulo abangenzi lutho.

entries.source: A serious learning companion should help with the work around the answer:
entries.value: Umlingani wokufunda ozimisele kufanele asize ngomsebenzi ozungeze impendulo:

entries.source: Access matters
entries.value: Ukufinyelela kubalulekile

entries.source: AI learning
entries.value: ukufunda nge-AI

entries.source: An AI learning companion should not pretend to be a magic authority. It should not erase uncertainty, replace teachers, or train learners to copy answers. The best systems are honest about limits and clear about the difference between help and handoff.
entries.value: Umlingani wokufunda nge-AI akufanele azenze igunya lomlingo. Akufanele asuse ukungaqiniseki, athathe indawo yothisha, noma aqeqeshe abafundi ukukopisha izimpendulo. Izinhlelo ezingcono kakhulu zithembekile ngemikhawulo futhi zicacile ngomehluko phakathi kosizo nokudlulisela umsebenzi.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step.
entries.value: Cela isinyathelo sokuqala esincane.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning.
entries.value: Cela i-AI ihlole ukucabanga kwakho.

entries.source: checking whether the learner can explain the idea back.
entries.value: ukuhlola ukuthi umfundi angakwazi yini ukuchaza umqondo abuye nawo.

entries.source: choosing the right starting level;
entries.value: ukukhetha izinga elifanele lokuqala;

entries.source: End with a recap from memory.
entries.value: Qeda ngesifinyezo esivela enkumbulweni.

entries.source: For a learner, that can feel very different from searching the web. Search gives pages. A learning companion gives a path.
entries.value: Kumfundi, lokho kungazwakala kuhluke kakhulu ekusesheni iwebhu. Ukusesha kunikeza amakhasi. Umlingani wokufunda unikeza indlela.

entries.source: For a wider view of how the public pages connect, browse the AI learning map, the subject hubs, or the AI learning prompt library. Those pages are designed to make the product understandable to learners and discoverable to search systems without hiding the useful parts behind an account wall.
entries.value: Ukuze ubone kabanzi ukuthi amakhasi omphakathi axhumana kanjani, bheka imephu yokufunda nge-AI, izikhungo zezihloko, noma umtapo wemiyalo yokufunda nge-AI. La makhasi aklanyelwe ukwenza umkhiqizo uqondakale kubafundi futhi utholakale ezinhlelweni zosesho ngaphandle kokufihla izingxenye eziwusizo ngemuva kodonga lwe-akhawunti.

entries.source: giving examples before abstractions when needed;
entries.value: ukunikeza izibonelo ngaphambi kwezinto ezingabonakali lapho kudingeka;

entries.source: Information is everywhere. Understanding is still unevenly distributed.
entries.value: Ulwazi lukhona yonke indawo. Ukuqonda kusasatshalaliswa ngokungalingani.

entries.source: noticing what the learner already understands;
entries.value: ukuqaphela lokho umfundi asekuqonda kakade;

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is not equally available. A free public AI learning platform can help reduce that access gap by giving more people a patient first place to learn.
entries.value: Ukufundisa kwangasese kunamandla, kodwa akutholakali ngokulinganayo. Inkundla yomphakathi yamahhala yokufunda nge-AI ingasiza ukunciphisa lelo gebe lokufinyelela ngokunikeza abantu abaningi indawo yokuqala enesineke yokufunda.

entries.source: Repair the weak spot.
entries.value: Lungisa indawo ebuthakathaka.

entries.source: Say the goal in ordinary language.
entries.value: Yisho inhloso ngolimi olujwayelekile.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything if you have a topic in mind. Try Socratic Instruction if you want questions instead of an explanation. Use Flashcard Builder when you need to remember, or Exam Prep Planner when the problem is organizing your study time.
entries.value: Qala nge-Learn Anything uma unesihloko engqondweni. Zama i-Socratic Instruction uma ufuna imibuzo esikhundleni sencazelo. Sebenzisa i-Flashcard Builder uma udinga ukukhumbula, noma i-Exam Prep Planner uma inkinga ukuhlela isikhathi sakho sokutadisha.

entries.source: That does not replace teachers, communities, books, or schools. It gives learners another route in. It can help a student start homework, a parent explain a concept, a self-taught builder learn code, or a curious person follow a question that might otherwise disappear.
entries.value: Lokho akuthathi indawo yothisha, imiphakathi, izincwadi, noma izikole. Kunikeza abafundi omunye umzila wokungena. Kungasiza umfundi aqale umsebenzi wasekhaya, umzali achaze umqondo, umakhi ozifundisayo afunde ikhodi, noma umuntu onelukuluku alandele umbuzo obungase unyamalale.

entries.source: That gap is why an AI learning companion matters. A good companion does more than answer a question. It helps a learner choose a starting point, explains the idea in plain language, checks whether it made sense, and keeps going when the first explanation does not land.
entries.value: Lelo gebe yingakho umlingani wokufunda nge-AI ebalulekile. Umlingani omuhle wenza okungaphezu kokuphendula umbuzo. Usiza umfundi akhethe indawo yokuqala, achaze umqondo ngolimi olulula, ahlole ukuthi uyenzile yini incazelo, futhi aqhubeke lapho incazelo yokuqala ingangeni.

entries.source: That is especially important for homework. The useful question is not "Can AI produce the answer?" It usually can. The useful question is "Can AI help the learner understand the path to the answer?" That is why the guide on studying with AI without cheating yourself focuses on hints, checks, and transfer practice.
entries.value: Lokho kubaluleke kakhulu emsebenzini wasekhaya. Umbuzo owusizo awuthi "Ingabe i-AI ingakhiqiza impendulo?" Imvamisa ingakwazi. Umbuzo owusizo uthi "Ingabe i-AI ingasiza umfundi aqonde indlela eya empendulweni?" Yingakho umhlahlandlela wokutadisha nge-AI ngaphandle kokuzikhohlisa ugxila ezelulekweni, ukuhlola, nokuzijwayeza ukudlulisa.

entries.source: That is the standard inspir is aiming for: learning that feels accessible, personal, playful, and useful for anyone with curiosity and an internet connection.
entries.value: Yilona zinga i-inspir elihlose lona: ukufunda okuzwakala kufinyeleleka, kungokomuntu siqu, kudlaleka, futhi kuwusizo kunoma ubani onelukuluku nokuxhumeka kwe-inthanethi.

entries.source: That is why inspir separates learning jobs into public modes. If you want a gentle explanation, start with Learn Anything. If you want to reason through a concept instead of being lectured, use Socratic Instruction. If you are stuck on an assignment, Homework Coach is a better fit than a generic answer engine. The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: Yingakho i-inspir ihlukanisa imisebenzi yokufunda ibe izindlela zomphakathi. Uma ufuna incazelo emnene, qala nge-Learn Anything. Uma ufuna ukucabanga ngomqondo esikhundleni sokufundiswa ngenkulumo, sebenzisa i-Socratic Instruction. Uma ubambekile emsebenzini, i-Homework Coach ifaneleka kangcono kunenjini yempendulo evamile. Ifomethi kufanele isize umsebenzi wokufunda.

entries.source: That loop appears across the platform. Math Step Coach breaks a problem into steps. Flashcard Builder turns notes into recall practice. Quiz Me On Trivia adds pressure-tested retrieval. Writing Coach helps improve a draft without replacing the writer.
entries.value: Lowo mjikelezo uvela kuyo yonke inkundla. I-Math Step Coach ihlukanisa inkinga ibe izinyathelo. I-Flashcard Builder iguqula amanothi abe ukuzijwayeza ukukhumbula. I-Quiz Me On Trivia ingeza ukubuyisa ulwazi okuhlolwe ngaphansi kwengcindezi. I-Writing Coach isiza ukuthuthukisa umbhalo wokuqala ngaphandle kokushintsha umbhali.

entries.source: The best AI learning sessions are not one long answer. They look more like a loop:
entries.value: Amasession angcono kakhulu okufunda awawona impendulo eyodwa ende. Abukeka njengomjikelezo:

entries.source: The best outcome is not a perfect answer. It is the moment a learner says, "I think I get it now. Let me try."
entries.value: Umphumela ongcono akuyona impendulo ephelele. Yilowo mzuzu lapho umfundi ethi, "Ngicabanga ukuthi sengiyakuthola. Ake ngizame."

entries.source: The common idea is simple: keep the learner active. AI should make thinking easier to start, not unnecessary to do.
entries.value: Umqondo ojwayelekile ulula: gcina umfundi esebenza. I-AI kufanele yenze ukucabanga kube lula ukuqala, hhayi kungadingeki ukukwenza.

entries.source: The easiest version of an AI tutor is a box that gives polished answers. That is useful sometimes, but it is not enough. A learner who only receives answers can leave with the page finished and the skill unchanged.
entries.value: Inguqulo elula kakhulu yothisha we-AI yibhokisi elinikeza izimpendulo ezibushelelezi. Lokho kuyasiza kwesinye isikhathi, kodwa akwanele. Umfundi othola izimpendulo kuphela angaphuma ikhasi seliqediwe kodwa ikhono lingashintshile.

entries.source: The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: Ifomethi kufanele isize umsebenzi wokufunda.

entries.source: The goal is confidence
entries.value: Inhloso ukuzethemba

entries.source: The important move is to start with a real learning job, not a perfect prompt. A good companion can help shape the path once you begin.
entries.value: Isinyathelo esibalulekile ukuqala ngomsebenzi wangempela wokufunda, hhayi umyalo ophelele. Umlingani omuhle angasiza ukubumba indlela uma usuqalile.

entries.source: The job is not just answering
entries.value: Umsebenzi akukhona ukuphendula kuphela

entries.source: The most useful AI learning tools have a few habits in common:
entries.value: Amathuluzi okufunda nge-AI awusizo kakhulu anezimiso ezimbalwa ezifanayo:

entries.source: They adapt the level without making the learner feel small.
entries.value: Zivumelanisa nezinga ngaphandle kokwenza umfundi azizwe emncane.

entries.source: They ask questions when the goal is unclear.
entries.value: Zibuza imibuzo lapho inhloso ingacacile.

entries.source: They encourage practice, not just reading.
entries.value: Zikhuthaza ukuzijwayeza, hhayi ukufunda kuphela.

entries.source: They give examples that match the learner's world.
entries.value: Zinikeza izibonelo ezihambisana nomhlaba womfundi.

entries.source: They make uncertainty visible when facts need checking.
entries.value: Zenza ukungaqiniseki kubonakale lapho amaqiniso edinga ukuhlolwa.

entries.source: This is why inspir is built around learning modes. Sometimes you need a clear explanation. Sometimes you need Socratic questions. Sometimes you need a quiz, flashcards, debate practice, a writing coach, or a historical roleplay.
entries.value: Yingakho i-inspir yakhelwe ngezindlela zokufunda. Kwesinye isikhathi udinga incazelo ecacile. Kwesinye isikhathi udinga imibuzo ye-Socratic. Kwesinye isikhathi udinga i-quiz, amakhadi okufunda, ukuzijwayeza inkulumo-mpikiswano, umqeqeshi wokubhala, noma ukudlala indima yomlando.

entries.source: This matters for schools and families because the first barrier is often not talent. It is the cost of help, the fear of asking a "basic" question, or the lack of a patient person at the exact moment confusion appears. A free public companion lowers the cost of beginning.
entries.value: Lokhu kubalulekile ezikoleni nasemindenini ngoba isithiyo sokuqala asivami ukuba ithalente. Kuvame ukuba izindleko zosizo, ukwesaba ukubuza umbuzo "oyisisekelo", noma ukungabi khona komuntu onesineke ngesikhathi esiqondile lapho ukudideka kuvela. Umlingani womphakathi wamahhala wehlisa izindleko zokuqala.

entries.source: Try the companion
entries.value: Zama umlingani

entries.source: Try the step yourself.
entries.value: Zama isinyathelo wena uqobo.

entries.source: turning passive reading into practice;
entries.value: ukuguqula ukufunda okungenzi lutho kube ukuzijwayeza;

entries.source: What an AI learning companion should do for everyone
entries.value: Okufanele kwenziwe umlingani wokufunda nge-AI kuwo wonke umuntu

entries.source: What it should not do
entries.value: Lokho okungafanele ikwenze

entries.source: What the companion should provide
entries.value: Okufanele umlingani akunikeze
